campaignName: Dragonlance: Shadow of the Dragon Queen
tagline: "Who would've thought that in a war game there'd be no good choices"
description: From a humble fishing village to the besieged walls of Kalaman, you must become the heroes Krynn desperately needs to survive the coming darkness.
